summary: PIN validation system unified testing - All features PASSED. Implemented missing /api/auth/verify-manager endpoint. Tested manager authorization dialog with 8 circles, 1-8 digit PIN validation, leading zero error, and VERIFICAR PIN button.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/verify-manager returns 200 OK for valid admin PIN '100'
Backend: PIN starting with 0 returns 400 with 'El PIN no puede iniciar con 0'
Backend: Empty PIN returns 400 with 'PIN es requerido'
Backend: Invalid PIN returns 401 with 'PIN incorrecto'
Frontend: Login with PIN '100' navigates to dashboard successfully
Frontend: Manager Authorization dialog shows '8 circles' for PIN display
Frontend: Dialog shows 'Esta anulación requiere PIN de administrador (1-8 dígitos)'
Frontend: PIN starting with 0 shows error 'PIN no puede iniciar con 0'
Frontend: Valid PIN '100' fills 3 of 8 circles correctly
Frontend: VERIFICAR PIN button enabled after entering 1+ digits
Frontend: VERIFICAR PIN successfully authorizes and shows 'Autorizado por: Admin'
Frontend: After verification, dialog shows reason selection with manager authorization confirmed
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py: Implemented /api/auth/verify-manager endpoint with proper PIN validation (1-8 digits, no leading zero)
auth.py: Only admin, supervisor, or manager_on_duty users can authorize
OrderScreen.js: Validates PIN cannot start with 0 (lines 1930-1933)
OrderScreen.js: VERIFICAR PIN button enabled when PIN length >= 1 (line 1952)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PIN validation system is unified and working. Manager authorization dialog shows 8 circles, accepts 1-8 digit PINs, rejects leading zeros, and has VERIFICAR PIN button. Backend endpoint /api/auth/verify-manager was missing and has been implemented.

features_verified.8_circles_display: PASS - Dialog shows 8 circles for PIN indicator
features_verified.1_8_digit_pin: PASS - PIN '100' (3 digits) accepted and validated
features_verified.leading_zero_validation: PASS - Shows 'PIN no puede iniciar con 0' error
features_verified.verificar_pin_button: PASS - Button works and authorizes successfully

bug_fixed.endpoint_missing: /api/auth/verify-manager was returning 404 - FIXED by implementing the endpoint
